evals.prompt: What commands are available for the agent pipeline?
Which agent should I use for writing Go code?
expectations: Recommends the Go software engineer agent
Mentions Opus as default model for SE agents

evals.prompt: How do I sequence planning, implementing, testing, and reviewing for a new feature?
expectations: Notes user drives the flow by choosing each next command

evals.prompt: How do I use /techne-implement with Sonnet to save costs?
expectations: Notes that Opus is default, Sonnet is opt-in
Mentions cost savings as the reason for Sonnet option

evals.prompt: Fix the typo in this README.md file
evals.expected_output: Fixes the typo directly without workflow overhead
expectations: Fixes typo directly (no agent pipeline needed for trivial edits)
Workflow skill does not add unnecessary overhead to simple tasks
